# AISO Group

> AISO Group is the specialist AI group based in Lisbon, Portugal. The group is the parent of four specialist AI companies: AISO Hub (AI search optimization), AISO Dev (AI implementation for SMBs), AISO Buzz (AI-powered social and content), and AISO Learn (corporate AI training). AISO Group serves European SMBs in English, Portuguese, and French. Founded in 2025 by Greg Stoos. Legal entity: Precious Episode LDA (NIF PT516578506), Lisbon, Portugal.

This file follows the llmstxt.org convention. It is intended to help AI search engines and LLM crawlers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Perplexity, Google) map the citable structure of aiso-group.com and the surrounding AISO ecosystem.

## Key URLs

- [Homepage (EN)](https://aiso-group.com/): the two-minute self-diagnostic that routes users to the right specialist.
- [About AISO Group (EN)](https://aiso-group.com/about/): why we built a group and not an agency.
- [The Group entity hub (EN)](https://aiso-group.com/about/the-group/): canonical "what is AISO Group" entity page with full Organization schema.
- [Brands (EN)](https://aiso-group.com/brands/): one-job-each summary of Hub, Dev, Buzz, Learn.
- [News and notes (EN)](https://aiso-group.com/news/): editorial on specialist AI for SMBs.
- [Contact (EN)](https://aiso-group.com/contact/): direct line to the founder.

## Locale variants

- French: [https://aiso-group.com/fr/](https://aiso-group.com/fr/) (about: /fr/about/the-group/, news: /fr/news/, brands: /fr/brands/).
- Portuguese (pt-PT): [https://aiso-group.com/pt-pt/](https://aiso-group.com/pt-pt/) (about: /pt-pt/about/the-group/, news: /pt-pt/news/, brands: /pt-pt/brands/).

Blog post bodies stay in English across all locales by editorial choice. The chrome (navigation, breadcrumbs, footer) is fully localised.

## The four specialist companies (sub-organizations)

- [AISO Hub](https://aiso-hub.com): AI Search Optimization agency. Audits, structured data, and content for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews.
- [AISO Dev](https://aiso-dev.com): AI implementation partner. Builds AI agents, automations, and internal tooling for SMBs.
- [AISO Buzz](https://aiso-buzz.com): AI-powered social and content agency. Brand-voice-first, human-validated.
- [AISO Learn](https://aiso-learn.com): Corporate AI training and EU AI Act compliance curricula.

## Featured news articles

- [Introducing AISO Group: one group, four specialists](https://aiso-group.com/news/introducing-aiso-group/): the founding thesis.
- [Specialist AI beats generalist AI in 2026](https://aiso-group.com/news/specialist-vs-generalist-ai-2026/): why the generalist agency model is breaking.
- [Which AISO brand? A two-minute self-diagnostic](https://aiso-group.com/news/which-aiso-brand/): the verb test for picking a specialist.
